response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates strong technical expertise across multiple domains, including AI-agent infrastructure, full-stack development, and open-source contributions. While his experience aligns well with the technical requirements, his background lacks explicit director-level leadership or deep AI strategy focus, which slightly reduces his fit for this principal engineer role.
strengths: Broad technical expertise across web, mobile, desktop, and embedded systems with fluency in multiple languages (TypeScript, Node.js, Dlang, etc.).
Hands-on experience with AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling (e.g., MCP code generators), aligning with AI product development.
Entrepreneurial mindset demonstrated through founding GISCollective and open-source contributions, showing initiative and innovation.
concerns: Lacks explicit director-level individual contributor experience or evidence of advising strategic customers/partners on AI adoption.
No advanced degree (Master's/PhD) in an AI-related field, which is a preferred qualification.
Experience in cloud technologies and AI is present but not deeply emphasized as a core focus in recent roles.
